channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Milos Uzan's late bucket on inbound play sends Houston into Elite Eight with 62-60 win over Purdue
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Houston spent time this week practicing an inbound play that coach Kelvin Sampson thought his team might need against Purdue. Milos Uzan, the third option, ran it to perfection.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Betts hits winning 3-run homer in 10th as Dodgers beat Tigers 8-5 for first 4-0 start since 1981
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Mookie Betts hit a game-winning, three-run homer in the 10th inning to lift the Dodgers to an 8-5 win over the Detroit Tigers on Friday night a few hours after Los Angeles received its 2024 World Series rings.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Juan Soto slugs first homer for Mets in win against Astros
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — After slugging his first home run with the New York Mets on Friday night, Juan Soto insisted he isn’t burdened by the lofty expectations to perform after signing his record deal.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Golden Knights overcome Donato's hat trick to beat Blackhawks 5-3 for 5th straight win
item.description: Pavel Dorofeyev scored a power-play goal with 3:10 left to snap a tie, and the Vegas Golden Knights rallied for their fifth straight win, 5-3 over the Chicago Blackhawks on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tennessee is heading back to the Elite Eight as defense clamps down in 78-65 win over Kentucky
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Those two regular-season losses to Kentucky don't mean anything to Tennessee now. The Volunteers avenged them in convincing fashion on the big stage of the NCAA Tournament on Friday night, posting a no-doubt 78-65 victory that sent them to a second consecutive Elite Eight.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Michigan State's 2nd-half rally sends Spartans past Ole Miss 73-70 as Izzo wins again in Sweet 16
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Jase Richardson's hot shooting helped Michigan State overcome a poor start and move into another Elite Eight, though the Spartans need at least one more win for a real celebration. “We don’t put up any banners for Elite Eights,” coach Tom Izzo said.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Scottie Scheffler ties record with 62 for the lead in the Houston Open
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Scottie Scheffler opened with two straight birdies and was on his way Friday in the Houston Open, tying the Memorial Park record with an 8-under 62 for a one-shot lead when the second round was halted by darkness after a two-hour storm delay Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL legend Randy White fights fentanyl after personal tragedy
item.description: Jesse Dempsey, a professional snowboarder, unknowingly took a pill laced with fentanyl, believing it was a prescribed painkiller for a knee injury.
item.dc:creator: Brian Dorman, NewsNation

item.title: Giddey's half-court buzzer beater completes miraculous comeback against Lakers, 119-117
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Josh Giddey could feel it as soon as the ball left his fingertips. In a flash, teammates were mobbing him.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Padres rally in seventh inning to win home opener against Braves
item.description: The Padres kicked off the 2025-2026 season with a comeback victory over the Atlanta Braves Thursday at Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: White Sox hammer Angels in lopsided Opening Day win
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The weather on White Sox Opening Day mirrored their franchise outlook heading into 2025. Murky, gray and dreary with little to be excited about besides the fact baseball season is all the way back. Good thing the White Sox played well in spite of the melancholy conditions.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Baseball: Point Loma 13, Montgomery 6
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Out on the point a high scoring baseball game between Point Loma and Montgomery. The Pointers hold on to win 13-6. Point Loma jumped out to an 8-2 lead, but Montgomery quickly scored four runs to cut it to 8-6.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: New San Diego Padres mural in North Park nears completion
item.description: A new San Diego Padres-themed mural in North Park replacing a previous work of public art that had been defaced earlier this year by fans of the rival Los Angeles Dodgers is nearing completion, just in time for opening weekend.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: SF's Chase Center hosting NCAA Men's Basketball games Thursday, Saturday
item.description: (BCN) -- San Francisco is hosting two games at Chase Center on Thursday in the NCAA Men's Basketball Championship tournament. At 4:39 p.m., University of Florida, which is the No. 1 seed in the West region of the tournament's bracket, plays No. 4 University of Maryland.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Opening Day 2025: Cubs have a winning Opening Day record, featuring some memorable moments
item.description: CHICAGO — Opening Day is finally upon us. It's a day that comes with a sense of hope among baseball fans in early spring, a season that represents new beginnings often exemplified by the warmer temperatures and the blooming of trees and flowers.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Opening Day 2025: White Sox have a winning Opening Day record, featuring some memorable moments
item.description: CHICAGO — Opening Day is finally upon us. It's a day that comes with a sense of hope among baseball fans in early spring, a season that represents new beginnings often exemplified by the warmer temperatures and the blooming of trees and flowers.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox Opening Day: A lot of 'new' on the South Side in 2025. What to know if you're headed to Rate Field
item.description: CHICAGO — After a 2024 season that everyone would rather forget, there's a lot of "new" on the South Side as the White Sox get set to embark on their 2025 campaign Thursday. There's a new manager, Will Venable. There's a new stadium name, Rate Field. There's a new food and beverage menu.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Baseball: Southwest 7, Crawford 0
item.description: Baseball time on Tuesday afternoon with Crawford hosting Southwest. The Raiders won 7-0. Sebestian Martinez was stellar on the bump for the Raiders complete game shutout scattering five hits with 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Will Applegate: Why Grand Junction's three-sport star chose baseball and his legacy on GJHS
item.description: Few local high school athletes have made an impact quite like Grand Junction High School's Will Applegate.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: BYU expects shootout against Alabama in Sweet 16
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (ABC4 Sports) - The last time BYU was in the Sweet 16 was 2011 with Jimmer Fredette. For the local BYU players who grew up in Utah, they remember it well.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Softball: Poway 2, Patrick Henry 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- A gorgeous day to play softball on Monday afternoon with Patrick Henry hosting Poway. The Titans won a fantastic game 2-0 in 10 innings. Great pitching on both sides with Mya McGowan leading the way for Poway with a complete game shutout and adding 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego State Aztec guard declares for NBA Draft
item.description: San Diego State Aztecs men's basketball player Miles Byrd is looking to make his next move to the professional level.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz get crushed by Memphis, 140-103
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Just when you think things can sink any lower for the Utah Jazz, they get outscored by 38 points in the second half in a 140-103 blowout loss to the Memphis Grizzlies Tuesday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers to make Trump White House visit next month
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers plan to visit President Donald Trump at the White House to celebrate their World Series victory, the team announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, Fox 5

item.title: Tony Finau out to win second Houston Open
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - Utah native Tony Finau came into this year after going through two pretty big life events. The first was knee surgery back in December.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: WWE legend Kane says Dems have 'real issue' with masculinity
item.description: WWE Hall of Famer Kane — also known as Glenn Jacobs, mayor of Knox County, Tennessee — joined "Morning in America.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Trump makes NCAA men's wrestling championships his latest sports-focused trip
item.description: BRIDGEWATER, N.J. (AP) — President Donald Trump attended the NCAA wrestling championships on Saturday night for the second time in three years, the latest example of how he has mostly limited travel early in his new term to trips built around sports events.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, NewsNation
